summary: BRD content compliance verification on Mentor Global frontend. All required BRD strings verified across Home, About, and DEXA pages. All 12 routes load with HTTP 200. Contact form submits successfully (frontend-only success indicator). Navigation, footer, and solution detail pages render correctly. Zero console errors. 100% BRD content match.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is 517 lines with multiple section components inline - consider splitting into /components/home/{Hero,Positioning,Problem,Pillars,DexaSection,InnovationSection,ScaleSection,GlobalPresenceSection,FinalCTA}.jsx for maintainability (BRD compliance unaffected).
Mentor OS capabilities array in Dexa.jsx (lines 170-178) duplicates the same 10 items defined in dexaDomains.Mentor OS (line 10). Recommend importing from a single source to avoid drift.
Hero image uses loading='eager' which is fine, but other hero images on /dexa use loading='lazy' on above-the-fold imagery - minor LCP regression potential.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full BRD content audit performed via Playwright innerText checks (50+ specific BRD strings across /, /about, /dexa). All passed. Contact form fields verified with data-testids: contact-fullname/organization/email/phone/country/partner-type/solution-interest/message/preferred-email/preferred-phone/preferred-either/submit-button. Routes verified: 12/12 return HTTP 200 (/, /solutions, 5x /solutions/:slug, /dexa, /subsidiaries, /about, /team, /contact). Site has no backend - pure frontend.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found - all BRD compliance requirements met.
